full_text:
Small piece of tumor (2*3 cm) was cut and minced in 20 ml of of AdF++, 400 ul Dispase, and 200 ul RQ1-RNAse free DNAse. 40 min in oven.

RBC lysis was done using 3ml of the buffer. Final pellet was resuspended in 2 ml of the culture medium.

Cell count 1):

total: 2.51E5

live: 1.81E5

viability: 72.1%

Size: 10.6um

Cell count 2):

total: 3.43E5

live: 2.55E5

viability: 74.3%

Size: 9.5um

Average cell count: 2.18E6 / mL

Total volume: 2mL

Final cell count: 4.36 E6 cells

Then the cells were frozen in Stem Cell Banker, in 2 cryovials, each containing 1 ml and 2.18E6 cells.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
